records.m_Talk_ENG: A corpse rising from the dead?
records.m_Talk_DEU: A corpse rising from the dead?
records.m_Talk_FRA: A corpse rising from the dead?

records.m_Talk_ENG: You already know this, but when someone dies in a Corrupted Area, they usually turn into a C.O.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You already know this, but when someone dies in a Corrupted Area, they usually turn into a C.O.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You already know this, but when someone dies in a Corrupted Area, they usually turn into a C.O.

records.m_Talk_ENG: There are cases where the body retains its form after becoming a C.O...
records.m_Talk_DEU: There are cases where the body retains its form after becoming a C.O...
records.m_Talk_FRA: There are cases where the body retains its form after becoming a C.O...

records.m_Talk_ENG: But it's rare.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But it's rare.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But it's rare.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Unless necromancy is involved, or an Artifact with that power is being used.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Unless necromancy is involved, or an Artifact with that power is being used.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Unless necromancy is involved, or an Artifact with that power is being used.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Or if someone possesses the knowledge of resurrection magic.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Or if someone possesses the knowledge of resurrection magic.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Or if someone possesses the knowledge of resurrection magic.

records.m_Talk_ENG:
And of course, there's another possibility you're well aware
8g
records.m_Talk_DEU:
And of course, there's another possibility you're well aware
8g
records.m_Talk_FRA:
And of course, there's another possibility you're well aware
8g

records.m_Talk_ENG: No, that's enough.
records.m_Talk_DEU: No, that's enough.
records.m_Talk_FRA: No, that's enough.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The point is, there are no actual ghosts or evil spirits.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The point is, there are no actual ghosts or evil spirits.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The point is, there are no actual ghosts or evil spirits.

records.m_Talk_ENG: What if a real ghost shows up?
records.m_Talk_DEU: What if a real ghost shows up?
records.m_Talk_FRA: What if a real ghost shows up?

records.m_Talk_ENG: There's no such thing. People just mistake C.O.s for ghosts.
records.m_Talk_DEU: There's no such thing. People just mistake C.O.s for ghosts.
records.m_Talk_FRA: There's no such thing. People just mistake C.O.s for ghosts.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But hey, the more cowards there are, the better it is for me.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But hey, the more cowards there are, the better it is for me.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But hey, the more cowards there are, the better it is for me.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Just means more profit.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Just means more profit.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Just means more profit.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Well, an exorcist needs to have that kind of mindset to make a living.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Well, an exorcist needs to have that kind of mindset to make a living.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Well, an exorcist needs to have that kind of mindset to make a living.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Oh, come on.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Oh, come on.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Oh, come on.

records.m_Talk_ENG: By the way, if ghosts were actually real, there's something I'd like to try.
records.m_Talk_DEU: By the way, if ghosts were actually real, there's something I'd like to try.
records.m_Talk_FRA: By the way, if ghosts were actually real, there's something I'd like to try.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'd get them to cough up whatever treasures they stashed away before they died.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'd get them to cough up whatever treasures they stashed away before they died.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'd get them to cough up whatever treasures they stashed away before they died.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I mean, they don't need worldly possessions anymore, do they?
records.m_Talk_DEU: I mean, they don't need worldly possessions anymore, do they?
records.m_Talk_FRA: I mean, they don't need worldly possessions anymore, do they?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Heh... Hehehe... Just thinking about it makes my mouth water...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Heh... Hehehe... Just thinking about it makes my mouth water...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Heh... Hehehe... Just thinking about it makes my mouth water...

records.m_Talk_ENG: What are you doing over there?
records.m_Talk_DEU: What are you doing over there?
records.m_Talk_FRA: What are you doing over there?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Eeeep!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Eeeep!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Eeeep!

records.m_Talk_ENG: You said you were going to the bathroom, but it's been an hour.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You said you were going to the bathroom, but it's been an hour.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You said you were going to the bathroom, but it's been an hour.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Oh, I just needed to check a few things before we head out.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Oh, I just needed to check a few things before we head out.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Oh, I just needed to check a few things before we head out.

records.m_Talk_ENG: As per the contract, all expenses are covered by the client.
records.m_Talk_DEU: As per the contract, all expenses are covered by the client.
records.m_Talk_FRA: As per the contract, all expenses are covered by the client.

records.m_Talk_ENG: That's fine.
records.m_Talk_DEU: That's fine.
records.m_Talk_FRA: That's fine.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Compared to calling in a TASKFORCE, it's a bargain.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Compared to calling in a TASKFORCE, it's a bargain.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Compared to calling in a TASKFORCE, it's a bargain.

records.m_Talk_ENG:
Heh
8v hehe. Right?
records.m_Talk_DEU:
Heh
8v hehe. Right?
records.m_Talk_FRA:
Heh
8v hehe. Right?

records.m_Talk_ENG:
It's much more profitable
8g I mean, this is an exorcism so there's no need to call in a TASKFORCE.
records.m_Talk_DEU:
It's much more profitable
8g I mean, this is an exorcism so there's no need to call in a TASKFORCE.
records.m_Talk_FRA:
It's much more profitable
8g I mean, this is an exorcism so there's no need to call in a TASKFORCE.

records.m_Talk_ENG: All right, let's get going.
records.m_Talk_DEU: All right, let's get going.
records.m_Talk_FRA: All right, let's get going.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The underground crypt is thick with negative energy. If we don't start working during the day, things could get tricky.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The underground crypt is thick with negative energy. If we don't start working during the day, things could get tricky.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The underground crypt is thick with negative energy. If we don't start working during the day, things could get tricky.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I brought my car.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I brought my car.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I brought my car.

records.m_Talk_ENG: We'll have a comfortable ride to the estate.
records.m_Talk_DEU: We'll have a comfortable ride to the estate.
records.m_Talk_FRA: We'll have a comfortable ride to the estate.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Woohoo!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Woohoo!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Woohoo!

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...I mean, I am grateful for your generosity, Brother Ludwig.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...I mean, I am grateful for your generosity, Brother Ludwig.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...I mean, I am grateful for your generosity, Brother Ludwig.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Everything should be fine. Hanging up now.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Everything should be fine. Hanging up now.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Everything should be fine. Hanging up now.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hung up after saying her piece again...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hung up after saying her piece again...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hung up after saying her piece again...

records.m_Talk_ENG: I keep telling her to hear people out before interrupting.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I keep telling her to hear people out before interrupting.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I keep telling her to hear people out before interrupting.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Well, she's always been hard to handle.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Well, she's always been hard to handle.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Well, she's always been hard to handle.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Let's hope you don't get caught this time either, Lucia.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Let's hope you don't get caught this time either, Lucia.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Let's hope you don't get caught this time either, Lucia.

records.m_Talk_ENG: By the way, a lot of people are willing to pay good money for those secret photos of you.
records.m_Talk_DEU: By the way, a lot of people are willing to pay good money for those secret photos of you.
records.m_Talk_FRA: By the way, a lot of people are willing to pay good money for those secret photos of you.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'm just trying to do my part. You understand, right?
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'm just trying to do my part. You understand, right?
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'm just trying to do my part. You understand, right?
